options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_mode
options.description: Set The Current Run Goal [Working Options = kill_caretaker (default), goldrush, hunter (In BETA, Expect Bugs [Pun Intended])]

options.name: max_hazard
options.display_name: Set Max Hazard for All Objectives
options.description: Determines how high the highest generated hazard level will be for objectives.

options.name: biome_start
options.description: Determines what Biome you start with unlocked (Kill Caretaker Goal) [Unlocks all but End Biome]

options.name: biome_end
options.display_name: Biome for Final Boss in Kill Caretaker
options.description: Determines what Biome you end with (Kill Caretaker Goal)

options.name: gold_rush_val
options.description: Set The Current Gold Rush Gold needed (GoldRush Goal) [Must be Multiple of 50]

options.name: hunter_trophies
options.description: Set The Current Hunter Trophies Needed per enemy (Hunter Goal)

options.name: hunter_targets
options.display_name: Valid Hunter Targets for Hunter Goal
options.description: Determines what counts for the Hunter Goal (Hunter Goal)

options.name: hunter_bosses
options.display_name: How Many Boss Trophies Finished To Win?
options.description: Determines how many Boss Hunter Goals you must meet to win (Hunter Goal)

options.name: hunter_trophies_b
options.description: Set The Current Hunter Trophies Needed per Boss enemy (Hunter Goal)

options.name: progression_diff
options.description: Determines how high the progressive check locks are for each sphere. (Completion by Diff LeafLover=10%, Normal=25%, Hard=33%, Lethal=50%, Karl=75%)

options.name: starting_stats
options.description: Determine how hard your starting stats are. this also affects your maximum stats reached

options.name: avail_classes
options.description: Set you starting class

options.name: sprint_start
options.description: Sets whether sprinting should be possible from the start (removes some base movespeed checks)

options.name: wep_rando
options.description: Set Weapons randomization Style

options.name: wep_primary
options.description: Set you starting primary weapon. (Make sure its for your starting class)

options.name: wep_secondary
options.description: Set you starting secondary weapon. (Make sure its for your starting class)

options.name: error_cube_checks
options.description: Sets the number of checks to be Error cubes (Defaults to 10)

options.name: traps_on
options.description: Turns on/off Trap Items

options.name: minigames_on
options.description: Turns on/off Jetty Boot as a location

options.name: minigame_num
options.description: Sets the high score needed for all the Minigame Locations (in increments of 5)

options.name: events_on
options.description: Turns on/off Machine Events as a location

options.name: coin_shop_prices
options.description: Set the avg coin shop price. This will determine the cost of APCoin Shop Items in game.

options.name: gold_to_coin_rate
options.description: Set the value of Gold Gathered to APCoin Conversion Rate. For example setting this to 100 would mean 100x gathered gold gets you 1x APCoin.

options.name: beermat_to_coin_rate
options.display_name: Beer Materials to APCoin Conversion Rate
options.description: Set the value of Beer Materials to APCoin Conversion Rate. For example setting this to 5 would mean 5x gathered beer materials gets you 1x APCoin.

options.name: shop_item_num
options.description: Set the amount of items to be in the APCoin Shop.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: death_link_all
options.description: Sets whether deathlink will kill all palyers, or just a single dwarf at random (in multiplayer)

options.name: death_link_failure
options.display_name: Should Deathlink Only Send On Mission Failure?
options.description: Sets whether deathlink will send only on Mission Failure (instead of dwarf death)

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
